# Lazoff Tech
> Boutique software engineering for companies that value craft.

## About
Lazoff Tech has been building systems for teams that care about getting it right since 2016 — from trade processing at Goldman Sachs to the infrastructure behind MetaMask. We work with a small number of clients at a time. Every project gets our full attention.

## Contact
- Email: hello@lazoff.tech
- Website: https://lazoff.tech
